examples.text:
كأنما الآل باعوا لها … سوائمٌ قد غابَ راعيها
تتلع أحياناً أكمها … ثم تهاوى في مهاويها
examples.english:
As though the family sold her … cattle of which the herder dashes
Their hills at times can hold them … Then into their pits she crashes.

senses.gloss: a vapor or exhalation that becomes visible in the desert in the morn or eve distinct from a سَرَاب (sarāb) by not reflecting

examples.text: وَفِي غَمْرَةِ الْآلِ خِلْتُ الصُّوَى … عُرُوكًا عَلَى رَائِس يَقْسِمُونَا
examples.english: In the overabundance of fogs I fancied the barrows … the mariners onto the valleyhead, dividing us
